top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
  AND c.Id IS NULL
  AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
  AND c.Id IS NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
  AND c.Id IS NULL
  AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL;
